purpose: Tree-shaking + bundle-size baseline for the evaluator consolidation arc (parser/runtime.ts canonical + ExpressionRegistry).
notes: Updated 2026-07-20 (pre-release audit): added the four headline slim bundles (lite, lite-plus, hybrid-complete, hybrid-hx) which previously had NO size-regression coverage, and refreshed all sizes post-#736 (pick/vocab semantic growth, single-copy verified). This check now runs in the CI bundle-size job. Run `node scripts/bundle-size-snapshot.mjs --check` after changes; failures (±5% drift) point to tree-shaking or duplication regressions.

hyperfixi-minimal.js.evaluator_strategy: createCoreRegistry (3 of 7 categories: references, logical, special) + parser/runtime.ts canonical evaluator

hyperfixi-standard.js.evaluator_strategy: createCommonRegistry (5 of 7 categories) + parser/runtime.ts canonical evaluator

hyperfixi-classic.js.evaluator_strategy: createExpressionRegistry (6 of 7 categories: caller-selected) + parser/runtime.ts canonical evaluator

hyperfixi-classic-i18n.js.evaluator_strategy: createExpressionRegistry (6 of 7 categories) + i18n keyword mapping + parser/runtime.ts canonical evaluator

hyperfixi.js.evaluator_strategy: kitchen-sink Runtime → constructs full ExpressionRegistry (7 categories) + parser/runtime.ts canonical evaluator

hyperfixi-hx-v4.js.evaluator_strategy: full Runtime + @hyperfixi/reactivity auto-install + htmx-compat (hx-* / fx-* / hx-live / sse-* / ws-*); canonical evaluator
